description: Story A (shared preamble). R1 -- no-framework-terms render rule. Extend prompt-workshop/shared/preamble.md (plan-register rules) so generated output uses only the school's plain vocabulary and none of the coined framework/process method-terms. Mirror to .workshopping (re-stamp content_hash) + re-pass verify-render-parity.py.
acceptance_criteria: A freshly generated plan, scanned against the enumerated process-method-term list, yields zero occurrences.

Compared against the pre-rule draft, the same plan retains its substantive content (all sections present and non-empty; nothing shortened or hollowed to dodge the terms) -- an adversarial reviewer confirms zero substance loss.
Plain descriptive English is still present where apt and is not flagged by the scan (e.g. 'talking at students' passes).
The dispatched output parses clean with no new fabrication flags, and the snippet-substrate parity check passes.
